title: Ivory Satin Midi Dress
reviews: Beautiful dress but runs small around the waist.
The satin looks premium but the fit was tighter than expected.
I loved the colour but had to size up.
Great for events but the product page should mention fitted waist.

title: Emerald Wrap Maxi Dress
reviews: Lovely colour and flattering wrap shape.

title: Cream Tailored Longline Blazer
reviews: Beautiful blazer but sleeves are too long.
The structure is premium but I needed tailoring.
Would be better if sleeve length was mentioned.

title: Black Pleated Midi Skirt
reviews: Works well with blouses and knits.

title: Champagne Satin Cami
reviews: Nice top but fabric feels delicate.
I was worried about washing it.
